summary: Home page auto-scrolling carousels for Featured Collections and Featured Rudraksha verified. Both use mvMarquee CSS animation, duplicate children (2x), and pause-on-hover CSS rule is present. Category and product tile routes intact.
passed: 2 [data-testid=auto-carousel] elements render on / (one for Collections, one for Featured Rudraksha)
Featured Collections heading present; inner .auto-marquee has 10 children (5 cats x 2) and animation-name=mvMarquee, duration=35s
Featured Rudraksha heading present; inner .auto-marquee has 8 children (4 products x 2), animation-name=mvMarquee, duration=50s
Pause-on-hover CSS rule '.group:hover .auto-marquee { animation-play-state: paused }' present in DOM
Category tiles retain data-testid=cat-<slug> and href=/shop?category=<slug>
Product cards inside 2nd carousel route to /product/<slug> (e.g., /product/5-mukhi-rudraksha-nepal)
Existing sections (Why MV Rudraksh, Testimonials 'Trusted by 10,000+ seekers', Newsletter) still render
action_items: Minor (pre-existing, not blocker): 2 React warnings 'empty string passed to src attribute' — likely a testimonial/category image with empty image_url in Supabase; unrelated to carousel work.
